productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Semi Formal Shoe
description: Designed for the man of style, this pair of black formal shoes from lee cooper is set to pivot you into a world of royal living. With just two pairs of eyelets and a fashionable lace-up system, gear up to don that unparalleled look.Upper Synthetic leather upper for durability and style Side panels held together at conical end with laces Synthetic laces for enhanced durability Lightly padded tongue with fabric inner Lightly cushioned fabric sockliner for in step comfort and snug Fit Heel cup for added protection to the backfoot and to lock the heel in place Rubber brand badge on lateral side of shoe Stitch detailing for durability and style Midsole Leather midsole for enhanced durability Padded foam footbed for all-day comfort Stitched brand badge on heel part of footbed Textured lining binding the upper and outsole, with added protection to the forefoot and backfoot Outsole TPU outsole for extra comfort and durability Textured and ridged outsole for durability, traction and grip Rubber box on medial arch for ergonomic support CareWipe surface with a soft, clean cloth to remove dustPolish using a good quality leather conditioner
